products.title: LG 630L Side-by-Side Refrigerator (GL-X257AMC3, InstaView Door-in-Door, Wi-Fi, Inverter, Ice & Water Dispenser)
products.short_description: LG 630L InstaView side-by-side refrigerator with Door-in-Door design, Wi-Fi connectivity, inverter compressor, and built-in ice & water dispenser.
products.long_description:
The LG 630L Side-by-Side Refrigerator (GL-X257AMC3) is a premium appliance designed for modern smart homes. Featuring InstaView Door-in-Door technology, it allows you to knock twice on the glass panel to view inside without opening the door, reducing cold air loss and improving efficiency.

With a massive 630-liter capacity, it is ideal for large families. The refrigerator comes equipped with a Smart Inverter Compressor that ensures energy efficiency, quieter operation, and longer durability.

The DoorCooling+ and Multi Air Flow systems ensure uniform cooling throughout the compartments, keeping food fresher for longer durations. Additionally, the Hygiene Fresh+ filter helps eliminate bacteria and odors, maintaining hygiene.

This model also includes a built-in ice and water dispenser, Wi-Fi connectivity via LG ThinQ app, and smart diagnosis features for troubleshooting. Its sleek matte black finish enhances the aesthetics of modern kitchens while offering advanced functionality.

positive: Spacious and perfect for large families
negative: Some cooling and performance issues reported
Scratches and dents in rare cases
